meta.title: The Air Force is considering using the B-21 for air-to-air combat
meta.description:
All the way back in July, we proposed the idea that the B-21 could potentially absorb some parts of the air superiority mission as the Air Force's Next Generation Air Dominance program began to falter. 

Now, that appears to be exactly what the Air Force is considering.
